# Md Shafaat Ali Choyon 

> Growth, marketing and public-health strategist with 16+ years turning complex systems into measurable results across telecom, advertising, fintech, e-commerce, consumer tech, education and healthcare. MBA · MCIM · MPH · CHES®. Based in Redford, Michigan, USA.

## About

Md Shafaat Ali Choyon (also written Shafaat Choyon) is a strategist who works at the intersection of growth marketing, health communication, digital-health product, and population health. He holds a Master of Public Health (Health Education & Promotion) and is CHES®-credentialed, holds an MBA, and is a Member of the Chartered Institute of Marketing (MCIM). His portfolio is framed through four lenses — Growth & Marketing, Health Communication, Health-Tech Product, and Population Health — each presenting the same body of work for a different audience.

## The through-line

His 16+ years move through three modes of value: winning **attention** (agency and brand work — a No. 1-globally product launch, a No. 1 marketplace category built in 2.5 months), building the **intelligence** behind decisions (data-led growth, BI housed inside marketing, 65–70% of decisions made on data), and owning measurable **outcomes** (growth, access, retention, public-health impact). His operating principle: "Read the system, find the lever, move the number."

## Areas of expertise

- Growth marketing and brand strategy
- Health communication and behavior-change campaigns
- Public health, population health, health literacy, and health policy
- Digital-health products and platform adoption
- Multi-channel campaigns and product marketing
- Operations, data and transformation (ERP/BI, ARPU/CLV/cohorting)

## Measurable results

- Praava Health: ~57% B2C CAGR (2021–2023); corporate clients grown 342 → ~1,400; lab margin ~30% → ~50%; roughly 2% of Bangladesh's population (~3.6 million people) reached during the COVID pandemic
- Samsung: Galaxy Note9 launch recognized No. 1 globally for growth (1.54x year-on-year)
- SureCash: 10-million-beneficiary government-to-person (G2P) stipend rollout; Banking Fair Award of Excellence
- Laser Treat Group: $0.5M operating-cost reduction and +13% patient retention via ERP/BI digitization
- Ekhanei.com: No. 1 motorbike category built in 2.5 months (+25% revenue, +15% market share)
- MPH Capstone: documented ~3x reach amplification on a multi-platform public-health campaign

## Selected experience

- Praava Health — Head of Marketing & Corporate Sales (Head of Consumer Business); 83% of revenue P&L, 30-person org
- Laser Treat Group — Chief Operating Officer (clinical operations and data transformation)
- Samsung, Asiatic (JWT), Grey/WPP, MGH, Grameenphone, SureCash, Ekhanei, ACCA — marketing, brand, product and campaign leadership across consumer tech, advertising, fintech, e-commerce and professional services
- Eastern Michigan University — Graduate Assistant (Health Promotion), Graduate Hall Director, and MPH candidate; public-health campaigns and evaluation

## Published writing

14 published health-policy and digital-health articles in outlets including The Eastern Echo, The Daily Star, Dhaka Tribune, IBT, and The Financial Express. Topics include the public-health workforce, health communication, health literacy, medical debt, public-health investment, misinformation, and digital health and the economy.

## In the press (independent coverage)

19 verified third-party mentions across 12 outlets (TV, print and digital), including:

- Appointment coverage: "Laser Treat names Md Shafaat Ali Choyon as new COO" (Dhaka Tribune, Nov 2023); "Shafaat becomes Laser Treat COO" (New Age, Nov 2023)
- TV & interviews: 19-minute live interview on ATN News "Happening Point" (May 2023); feature interview on business digitization in Bangladesh Pratidin (May 2021)
- Praava Health era: quoted launch spokesperson for the "Ghore Lab" home-diagnostics launch (The Business Standard, Feb 2023); signed strategic partnerships covered by The Business Standard (Guardian Life, Bangladesh Finance) and BEXIMCO's BOL; named among senior leadership in 5th- and 6th-anniversary coverage (The Daily Star, The Business Standard, Dhaka Tribune); named speaker at the Beauty & Wellness Centre launch (The Daily Star, Dec 2021)
- ACCA era: roundtable panelist quoted in The Daily Star's "The business partner of the future" with PwC Bangladesh (Dec 2019); named keynote at national certification ceremonies (The Financial Express, The Daily Observer, Feb 2020); named at the ACCA–BTEB MoU signing (Prothom Alo, May 2021)
- Ekhanei Bike Bazaar (2017): the first-of-its-kind second-hand motorbike fair he led was covered by The Daily Star, an ATN News "Young Nite" TV special, and GTV / Independent TV news bulletins

Full list with links: https://shafaatalichoyon.com/#press
